data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram utilizes a microservices architecture to manage its complex set of features and functionalities.
data.technical_spec: Decoupled microservices managed via REST APIs and gRPC.

data.title: Horizontal Scaling
data.description: Designed to handle millions of users simultaneously through distributed computing resources.
data.technical_spec: Load balancers and distributed server clusters deployed globally.

data.title: NoSQL Database
data.description: Utilizes NoSQL databases for rapid access to large volumes of unstructured data, e.g., user-generated content.
data.technical_spec: Systems like Cassandra and Redis for caching.

data.title: CDN Integration
data.description: Content Delivery Networks are used to deliver media content efficiently and reliably to a global audience.
data.technical_spec: Partnership with CDN providers like Akamai.

data.title: Containerization
data.description: Employs containerization for deploying applications consistently across different environments.
data.technical_spec: Docker and Kubernetes orchestration used for managing containers.
